about.title: Mauc App

about.description: The Art Museum of the Federal University of Ceará (Mauc) has nine spaces for long-term exhibitions and three for temporary exhibitions.

expositions.linkAriaLabel: See more details about the exhibition {{title}}

about.description: This application was developed to provide an audio-guided experience at the UFC Art Museum. With it, you can explore exhibitions and get detailed information about artworks directly on your mobile device. The app is easy to use and offers an intuitive interface, allowing you to navigate through different sections with ease. Additionally, you can access exclusive content and updates about future events and exhibitions. Enjoy your visit to the museum with our app!
about.supervisorDetails: Prof. Dr. Alysson Diniz dos Santos (Professor of Digital Media Systems Course)
about.footerText: This project was carried out with support from the Pro-Rectory of Culture at the Federal University of Ceará and the Artistic Culture Promotion Program.
about.logosAriaLabel: Realization, collaboration and support logos. Including PPCA, MAUC, PROCULT, SMD, LATAV/LEAD, TACTILE PHOTOGRAPHY, UNIVERSITY RADIO, PROINTER, PROGRAD and PRAE.

arquivo.imageAlt: image of the institutional archive repository
arquivo.institutionalDescription: Created from the preservation of documents related to the Museum's activities since its foundation in 1961, the Mauc Institutional Archive consists of annual reports, correspondence, photos, visitor signature books, exhibition catalogs and documentation of artists who are part of the museum's exhibition circuit. This collection safeguards records of significant and historical moments for UFC and for the artistic memory of Ceará.
arquivo.historicalDescription: It covers a set of personal documents related to the artistic activities of Swiss Jean-Pierre Chabloz carried out in Europe in the 1930s and in Brazil, discontinuously, between the 1940s and 1980s. Highlights include documents about activities carried out in Fortaleza during the 1940s, especially the documentation produced in 1943 for the Worker Mobilization Service for the Amazon – SEMTA. This last set received, in 2016, the UNESCO Seal in its Memory of the World Program due to its importance and thematic relevance.

biblioteca.description: The Floriano Teixeira Library maintains a collection specialized in the arts, consisting of books, catalogs, periodicals, pamphlets, among other types of documents. Among the special collections, we have the Jean-Pierre Chabloz collection, formed by books and magazines from the artist's personal library. In addition to the rare works collection, composed of slides, video tapes, magazines, pamphlets and rare books.

nucleos.communicationDescription: Responsible for planning and executing Mauc's digital communication actions such as the website, social media, Flickr and other projects. The CN is responsible for collaborating in Mauc's dialogue with its audience, whether visitors or partners (artists, curators, researchers, external authorities or institution members).
nucleos.educationalDescription: The Educational Nucleus of the UFC Art Museum (Nemauc) is responsible for planning, managing and executing the institution's Educational and Cultural Policy, through programs and projects aimed at dialogue, participation and the exercise of citizenship through art and heritage.
